rationale: Both answers faithfully preserve the observation, latent type, fixed review budget, post-review action, and platform-payoff objective without inventing prohibited facts. A is more usable and managerially explicit because it clearly identifies the governance trade-off, assigns each model element its role, and expressly preserves the performance evidence boundary. B is tighter and fully serviceable, but its compressed formulation provides less decision-oriented clarification and does not explicitly mention the performance boundary.
